description: This file is a repository module for managing 'roles' data within a MySQL database, including functions for counting, listing, bulk inserting, and searching roles with various filters.

methods.name: _jsonParseIfNeeded(v)
methods.description: Parses a value as JSON if it is a string; returns the value unchanged if it is already an object or null.

methods.name: countRoles()
methods.description: Returns the total number of roles in the roles table.

methods.name: listRoles({ limit = 1000 } = {})
methods.description: Returns a list of roles with optional limit, parsing JSON fields for core skills and seniority levels.

methods.name: bulkInsertRoles(roles)
methods.description: Inserts multiple roles into the roles table, generating UUIDs if not provided.

methods.name: _roleExists(roleId)
methods.description: Checks whether a role with the given ID exists in the database.

methods.name: _parseSalaryRangeToBounds(s)
methods.description: Converts a salary range string into numeric minimum and maximum bounds.

methods.name: _roleSkillsContainAll(roleSkills, requiredSkills)
methods.description: Checks if a role's skills contain all required skills, case-insensitive.

methods.name: searchRoles({ q = '', industry = null, skills = [], minSalary = null, maxSalary = null, limit = 50 } = {})
methods.description: Performs a filtered search of roles based on keywords, industry, skills, and salary range, returning matched roles with metadata.

ctags.name: searchRoles
ctags.pattern: /^async function searchRoles({ q = '', industry = null, skills = [], minSalary = null, maxSalary =/
ctags.signature: ({ q = '', industry = null, skills = [], minSalary = null, maxSalary = null, limit = 50 } = {})
